description_long: This is a life-sized representation of a rhinoceros, characterized by its robust, barrel-shaped body and thick, textured skin with a pale beige to brown coloration. The animal features a prominent horn on its snout, a broad head, and small, rounded ears. Its legs are short and sturdy, supporting its massive frame, and the tail is short and tapers to a point. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the natural hide of a rhinoceros. The overall form is solid and heavy, with realistic anatomical proportions and subtle muscle definition.
description: A large, robust rhinoceros with a thick, textured hide and a prominent horn, rendered in pale beige and brown tones.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the prominent horn, broad snout, and muscular forelimbs.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the rounded hindquarters and short tail.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the width of the hindquarters and the animal's solid stance.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the full length of the body, horn, and sturdy legs.
